name: Chana Masaledar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. When hot, add the cumin seeds.
3. After a few seconds, add the onion and stir-fry for 7 minutes.
4. Turn the heat to low and add the spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, coriander) one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Add the garlic and ginger, then fry for an additional 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Stir in the tomato paste.
7. Add the chick peas, salt, cayenne pepper, and lemon juice. Mix well.
8. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes. If the dish is too dry, add some chickpea stock and stir gently while cooking occasionally.
9. Serve over rice with Aloo Mattar Rasedaar.
